_comment: Per-artifact-type quality rubrics for the LLM judge (Task #10). Each criterion is scored 0-5 (5=excellent) by a fresh independent judge. 'threshold' is the minimum acceptable MEAN weighted score across N judge samples; 'instabilityBand' is the max acceptable std-dev (above it, quality is unstable even if the mean passes).

criteria.name: positioning_clarity
criteria.desc: Is the positioning a clear, single idea a buyer would grasp?

criteria.name: distinctiveness
criteria.desc: Is the brand distinctive and does it address the known name-collision risk (e.g. Caixa bank)?

criteria.name: audience_fit
criteria.desc: Does it fit the stated persona/audience and their literacy/context?

criteria.name: voice_consistency
criteria.desc: Is the voice coherent and free of jargon the audience would reject?

criteria.name: clarity
criteria.desc: Is every line immediately understandable to the audience?

criteria.name: persuasion
criteria.desc: Does the copy create motivation to act (benefit-led, concrete)?

criteria.name: voice_match
criteria.desc: Does it match the brand voice and positioning?

criteria.name: cta_strength
criteria.desc: Is the primary CTA specific, instrumented, and compelling?

criteria.name: coverage
criteria.desc: Are all needed pages present for the goal (no obvious gap)?

criteria.name: structure_logic
criteria.desc: Is the structure logical and conversion-oriented?

criteria.name: mandatory_legal_present
criteria.desc: Are the mandatory legal pages included?

criteria.name: completeness
criteria.desc: Are color/type/space/radius/tap-target tokens all defined?

criteria.name: internal_consistency
criteria.desc: Are tokens internally consistent and reusable?

criteria.name: a11y_contrast
criteria.desc: Do the color choices plausibly meet WCAG AA contrast?

criteria.name: evidence_concreteness
criteria.desc: Does it cite concrete EXECUTED evidence (screenshot/axe/HTTP/viewport), not prose?

criteria.name: verdict_justified
criteria.desc: Is the VERIFIED/BLOCKED verdict justified by the evidence shown?

criteria.name: defect_traceability
criteria.desc: Are defects (if any) traceable to an owner/fix, or clearly none?

criteria.name: clarity
criteria.desc: Is the artifact clear and unambiguous?

criteria.name: completeness
criteria.desc: Does it cover what its role requires?

criteria.name: internal_consistency
criteria.desc: Is it internally consistent and free of contradictions?
